purpose: Record the focused Damage & Threshold sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.scope: This sub-bucket covers Delay Damage, Dreadful Rage, Advantageous Attack, Attack Combo (Ranged), and Hew.
policy.engineReuse: Dreadful Rage is already handled by the existing Rage feat normalization hook. Do not duplicate Rage rules here.
policy.invalidEntries: Delay Damage is a class feature, not a feat. Hew is invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat audit. Do not implement either as a feat.
policy.comboAndDamageContext: Advantageous Attack and Attack Combo (Ranged) are stored as structured workflow metadata until exact trigger/bonus context is supplied by source text or a dedicated combo workflow.

implementedEntries.name: Advantageous Attack
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores conditional damage-rider metadata. No damage mutation occurs until workflow-confirmed trigger and target eligibility exist.

implementedEntries.name: Attack Combo (Ranged)
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores ranged attack-combo sequence metadata for a future combo workflow to consume.

alreadyImplementedElsewhere.name: Dreadful Rage
alreadyImplementedElsewhere.reason: Rage feat normalization already stores RAGE_ATTACK_DAMAGE_BONUS_OVERRIDE with +5 attack and +5 damage.

excludedEntries.name: Delay Damage
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid for feat implementation; this is a class feature, not a feat.

excludedEntries.name: Hew
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.
